name: Halogen + Li Screening + Annealing (recommended)
improvement_over_v1: Li sublattice re-optimization via MLIP MD annealing. Reduces basin transition risk.

steps.name: halogen_site_enumerate
steps.description: Same as v1. Enumerate S/Cl/Br on 4a/4c.

steps.name: halogen_screening
steps.description: Fix representative Li arrangement. MLIP relax all halogen configs. Select best halogen placement.

steps.name: li_screening
steps.description: Fix best halogen. Random 20 Li arrangements from 48h sites. MLIP relax. Measure energy spread.
steps.li_selection: Random from C(48,24) for Li6 or C(48,27) for Li5.4

steps.name: li_annealing
steps.description: Top 5 Li configs -> 500K MD annealing (50-100ps) -> MLIP relax. Champion selection.

physics.S2-: PS4 covalent bonds hold (P-S~3.5 eV >> kT)
physics.warning_800K: Cl/Br start hopping -> halogen enumeration invalidated

steps.key_finding: Screening and annealing rankings can reverse! comp1: #15 was rank 4 -> rank 2 after annealing. #0 remained champion (491 meV ahead).

steps.name: mlip_eos
steps.description: Champion structure volume scaling 96-108%. BM fitting for preliminary V0, B0.

steps.name: dft_relax
steps.description: Same as v1 step 3. But champion from annealing is deeper basin -> fewer transitions.

v1_vs_v2_comparison.interpretation: Li6 compositions insensitive to Li ordering (no vacancy). Delta expected larger for Li5.4.
